tfda.licenses_json: [{"permit": "衛署藥製字第013450號", "chinese_name": "特復拉西膠囊", "english_name": "TEDOFURYL CAPSULES", "indication": "消化系統之癌症（胃癌、膽道癌、脾臟癌、結腸癌、直腸癌）乳癌、肺癌、頭頸部癌（食道癌、頸部癌）症狀之緩解", "dosage": "", "dosage_form": "膠囊劑", "effective_until": "2029/05/25", "raw_ingredients": ["TEGAFUR (FTORAFUR)"], "topics": ["肺癌"], "topic_evidence": [{"concept_id": "lung_cancer", "topic": "肺癌", "preferred_name": "Lung Neoplasms", "mesh_id": "D008175", "matched_term": "肺癌", "match_kind": "direct_indication", "source_text": "消化系統之癌症（胃癌、膽道癌、脾臟癌、結腸癌、直腸癌）乳癌、肺癌、頭頸部癌（食道癌、頸部癌）症狀之緩解"}]}, {"permit": "衛署藥製字第045019號", "chinese_name": "\"派頓\" 克癌星注射液", "english_name": "TEGACIN INJECTION  \"PATRON\"", "indication": "消化器癌（胃癌、結腸癌、直腸癌）、乳癌、肺癌等症狀之緩解。", "dosage": "", "dosage_form": "注射劑", "effective_until": "2027/06/24", "raw_ingredients": ["TEGAFUR (FTORAFUR)"], "topics": ["肺癌"], "topic_evidence": [{"concept_id": "lung_cancer", "topic": "肺癌", "preferred_name": "Lung Neoplasms", "mesh_id": "D008175", "matched_term": "肺癌", "match_kind": "direct_indication", "source_text": "消化器癌（胃癌、結腸癌、直腸癌）、乳癌、肺癌等症狀之緩解"}]}]
